label: Social Auto-Pilot

Posts to 5+ social platforms 3x daily (8AM, 2PM, 8PM ET).
Uses GAS SocialPublisher.publishPost() for each platform.
Content rotates between tips, CTAs, testimonials, and informational posts.

label: The Closer
